title: feat(economics): buyer geography, payment methods & risky users on user intelligence dashboard
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
Adds a payments/abuse analytics layer to the User Intelligence Grafana dashboard at `apps/operation/economics/provisioning/dashboards/user-intelligence.json`. Default time window narrowed to 7d to keep Tinybird load reasonable.

**Buyer Geography row**
- Top countries by revenue (barchart)
- Pack mix donut, $2/$5/$10/$20/$50/$100 with distinct fixed colors
- Top countries × pack mix (stacked barchart)
- Revenue by country over time (stacked timeseries, top 5 + Other)
- ISO-3166 codes translated to full country names via ClickHouse `transform()` (279-entry lookup)

**Payment Methods & Failures row**
- Real payment method extracted by joining `checkout.session.completed` → `payment_intent.succeeded` on the PI ID and reading the `payment_method` column on the PI side (verified against Tinybird; the `charges`/`latest_charge` JSON paths are empty in our payloads)
- Payment Method Mix donut, Top Countries × Payment Method, Failure Rate by Payment Method, Failures Country × Payment Method
- Failure-reason drilldown: ranked decline codes with sample messages, and Country × Reason table
- `checkout.session.expired` events relabeled from `unknown` to `abandoned` so the failure-rate row is read correctly

**Risky Users panel**
- Top users by failed-payment attempts, joined to `d1_user` (ban status, tier, github) and latest `scoring_snapshot` (trust score, account age)
- Includes successful purchases, pollen bought, and success-rate% so carders are distinguishable from real customers
- GitHub username links to the profile

Already running on the prod dashboard server (https://economics.myceli.ai) off this branch.

gist.headline: Mapping the pollen flow
gist.blurb: Added a new payments and abuse analytics layer to our internal user intelligence dashboard. Now we can track buyer geography, payment methods, and spot risky behavior faster.
gist.summary: Added buyer geography, payment method analytics, and risky user tracking to the internal User Intelligence Grafana dashboard.
gist.impact: The operations team can now visualize revenue by country, track payment failure rates by method, and identify potential carding abuse by joining failed payment attempts with user trust scores.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a data analyst, looking at a retro computer monitor showing charts and maps. The robot companion helps analyze the data.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, looking at a retro computer monitor displaying colorful bar charts and a world map. A chunky pixel robot companion points at the screen excitedly. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites.
